name: panviz
description: Static publication-oriented sequence tube map renderer.

devNotes.runtime: Rendering needs only node_modules/playwright-core plus the prebuilt browser bundle in harness/dist; d3 and deep-equal are already bundled in. The committed bundle reproduces the accepted baseline.
devNotes.build: To rebuild the bundle after editing src/panviz_core/ or harness/tubemap_exact_entry.js: `npm install` then `npm run build`. The core uses d3 v5 APIs (d3.event) and d3-selection-multi, so stay on the d3 v5 line. After any rebuild, run `python3 tests/check_svg_structure.py` and byte-compare against tests/baseline before replacing the committed bundle.
devNotes.lockfile: package-lock.json is committed; `npm ci && npm run build` rebuilds the bundle deterministically (byte-identical) and reproduces byte-identical SVG output.
